description: Address review issues: remove GloryValkyrie duplicate, fix Hover Wyvern/Wyvern Hover duplicate, add cross-array ratchet comment, remove Stag duplicate.
steps: Remove 'GloryValkyrie' from wikiBladeNames array and 'Glory Valkyrie' from uxExpandedBladeNames Set
Remove 'WyvernHover' from wikiBladeNames array, remove 'Wyvern Hover' from uxBladeNames Set, and add 'Hover Wyvern' to uxBladeNames Set
Add a comment above wikiRatchetNames explaining CX-exclusive ratchets are intentionally omitted
Remove 'Stag' from cxLockChipNames since 'Bucks' is the TT name
acceptance_criteria: Glory Valkyrie is not in uxExpandedBladeNames
Wyvern Hover is not in uxBladeNames
A comment above wikiRatchetNames explains the CX-exclusive ratchets omission
verification: Run npx tsx -e to verify module loads
